title: Cross-Resonance Gates for Two-Qubit Operations
description: Learn the physics and pulse-level implementation of cross-resonance (CR) gates - the primary two-qubit entangling operation used in fixed-frequency superconducting quantum processors. Master CR pulse calibration and optimization.
learningObjectives: Explain the physics of cross-resonance interaction between coupled transmons
Derive the effective CR Hamiltonian and understand its ZX interaction term
Implement CR pulses with proper echoing sequences to cancel unwanted terms
Design calibration experiments for CR gate amplitude and duration
Analyze CR gate performance including leakage and classical crosstalk
